summary: Memory puzzle game with multiple puzzle types (card matching, sliding puzzle, pattern memory, sequence memory) that automatically increases difficulty as player progresses. Features brain training focus with score tracking, timer, and level progress system.
architectural_notes: Frontend: React + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS for UI
Backend: Motoko for game state and score persistence
Authentication: Internet Identity for secure login
Game Design: Progressive difficulty - automatically increases after each level completion
Brain Training Focus: Multiple puzzle types designed to improve memory and cognitive skills
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Brain icon with puzzle pieces for app logo (brain-logo.dim_128x128.png)
- Card back design with neural network pattern for memory matching game (card-back.dim_200x200.png)
- Abstract geometric pattern background for pattern memory game (pattern-bg.dim_800x600.png)
- Trophy icon for high score display (trophy.dim_64x64.png)

existing_features.title: Create a card matching memory game where players flip cards to find matching pairs, with a grid that starts at 4x4 and expands as difficulty increases
Implement a sliding puzzle game where players rearrange numbered tiles by sliding them into an empty space to restore correct order
Build a pattern memory game where players must replicate increasingly complex visual patterns shown briefly then hidden
Create a sequence memory game where players must remember and repeat sequences of items in correct order
Implement automatic progressive difficulty system that increases challenge after each completed level across all puzzle types
Add score tracking system with timer that records completion time and calculates scores based on speed and accuracy
Create level progress tracking system that shows player advancement through difficulty levels and unlocked puzzle types
Integrate Internet Identity authentication for secure user login and personalized game data
Design a modern, responsive game interface using React and Tailwind CSS with clean visual hierarchy and engaging brain training theme

new_feature_requests.summary: Backend storage for game state and high scores using Motoko
Build Motoko backend to store game state, high scores, and player progress with queries to retrieve player-specific data
